name: char-count-package

metadata.name: char-count-package
metadata.summary: A package to count the ocurrency of unique characters in a string or file.

documentation:
# Task 4 CLI

## To use this package

Create and activate a virtual environment.
```
virtualenv venv
venv/scripts/activate
```

Install the package:
```
python -m pip install --index-url https://test.pypi.org/simple/ --no-deps char_count_package
```

Now you can import the package:
```
import unique_char_count_package
```


## Usage

Examples:
```

```

modules.name: char_count_package.main
documentation:
This program accepts command line arguments under the flags --string and/or --filepath.
The script counts the ocurrence of unique characters in the given string or file.

functions.name: char_count_package.main.count_unique_characters
documentation: Return the total number of characters that appears only once in the given string

functions.name: char_count_package.main.read_file
documentation: Open a file, read it and return its content

functions.name: char_count_package.main.process_parameter
documentation: Process the parameter from command line, giving higher priority to the parameter '--file'.
